posts.name: VC Boom
posts.tagline: Score your deck, meet investors who fit, and raise more
posts.description: VC Boom scores your pitch deck in under 90 seconds and tells you the single fastest fix, matches you with the right investors from 47,000+ (each with a one-line reason they fit), then drafts personalized cold emails you send from your own inbox. Prep for each investor, then book the calls. Founders using VC Boom have already raised $95M. Built by an 8-year VC who raised hundreds of millions and deployed across 47 startups. Free to start, no subscription.

makers.name: Yoann Berno
makers.headline: Founder at VC Boom. 6x founder, 8y in VC

posts.name: ZeroGPU
posts.tagline: The compute efficient layer for AI inference
posts.description: The world can't build compute fast enough to keep up with AI demand. So we took a different path. ZeroGPU is AI infrastructure powered by small language models running on a hybrid edge network reusing compute that already exists. Not every task needs a frontier model. Our purpose-built, edge-optimized models run 10x faster, 50% cheaper and offload 70–80% of production tasks to small models with frontier-level accuracy.

posts.name: prostir zvuku
posts.tagline: A spatial nature sound mixer for Mac
posts.description: Build a quiet room around you for focus, rest, and sleep. Mix rain, fire, ocean, wind, birds, and streams on a canvas, place each sound where it belongs, and return to the same space whenever you need it.

posts.name: Krisp Voice Translation API
posts.tagline: Real-time speech-to-speech translation API
posts.description: Most voice translation APIs work great in demos. Then real users show up with background noise, accents and verification code that gets garbled. We built our technology on a million live contact center calls where accuracy is non negotiable. 96% accuracy on real calls, zero patient safety incidents, 61+ languages with any to any pair. Translation API is now available self-serve with 60 mins free credit upon signup to dev dashboard.

posts.name: agmsg
posts.tagline: Stop copy-pasting between your AI coding agents
posts.description: Stop being the copy-paste relay between your AI coding agents. agmsg lets Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and Copilot CLI message each other directly through a shared SQLite database — no daemon, no network, no Python. Just bash + sqlite3, installed as an Agent Skill. Unlike built-in subagents (single-vendor, ephemeral) or MCP (an agent calling tools), agmsg is vendor-agnostic and persistent. Run several agents — even multiple Claude Code instances — in one room, working together.

posts.name: Uiverse Design
posts.tagline: De-slop your AI generated websites
posts.description: You can tell when an app was vibecoded. So can your users. That generic purple gradient, the pills and badges, emojis everywhere, it all screams: "an AI made this in 20 minutes." Uiverse Design is a library of AI-first design systems you can drop into any project. Each one defines real typography, spacing, color, images and component treatment. All of them ship with a DESIGN.md instructions file, so that your agent knows exactly how to use it. You just sit back, and watch your app transform.

posts.name: Kimi Work
posts.tagline: The AI desktop for knowledge work
posts.description: Kimi Work is a desktop agent for knowledge work. It connects to local files, uses WebBridge for browser automation, runs scheduled tasks, coordinates agent swarms, creates PPT/Excel/Word/PDF outputs, and includes native finance data tools.

posts.name: BooBar
posts.tagline: AI Dynamic Island for your Mac
posts.description: BooBar is a local-first AI Dynamic Island for Mac that brings file organization, download progress, email codes, browser context, GitHub panels, and Codex/Claude tasks into one calm menu bar workspace.

posts.name: Fluido
posts.tagline: Turn any Figma shape into liquid metal in one click
posts.description: Fluido is a generative design tool that brings the mesmerizing aesthetic of liquid metal and chrome directly into your Figma canvas. Transform vectors, text, or frames into organic, fluid masterpieces instantly.

posts.name: hora Calendar
posts.tagline: Google calendar built for the Mac
posts.description: hora Calendar is a native Mac app for Google Calendar. See your next meeting in the menu bar, join Meet, Zoom, and Teams in one click, create events fast, schedule focus time, and sync directly with Google without proxying calendar data through hora servers.

posts.name: TravelMind
posts.tagline: AI-powered city discovery built on taste, not reviews
posts.description: You land in a new city. You open every app you know. Two hours later you're still scrolling, still unsure, still guessing. TravelMind was built for that moment. Swipe through places, tell us what you love — the AI does the rest. It learns your taste and finds the right spot before you even know to look. Your taste. Every city. Live now on iOS and Android.

posts.name: Limelight
posts.tagline: Make your screen recordings easy to follow
posts.description: Limelight makes everything you do on screen easy to follow. 🔦 Spotlight your cursor, ⌨️ show the keys you press, and ✏️ draw on screen — so your audience never loses track of what you're doing. Works with Zoom, OBS, Keynote, Google Slides, anything. Native, offline, no account. No subscription — $15 once, with a 7-day free trial.

posts.name: Whistle
posts.tagline: A fitness coach with personalized plans
posts.description: Most workout apps give you a generic plan and call it personalized. Whistle actually knows you. It reads your Apple Health data and builds a real training plan around your fitness level, recovery, and goals. Detailed workouts, smart progression, all on your iPhone and Apple Watch. Whether you're just getting started or pushing toward a new personal best, your AI coach figures out what you need and when you need it. Your data. Your plan. Your pace.

posts.name: Reve 2.0
posts.tagline: Generate and edit 4K images through layout-based control
posts.description: Reve 2.0 generates and edits 4K images using a layout-first model that segments each image into addressable regions. For designers, marketers, and creative teams who need precise compositional control.

posts.name: agentcad
posts.tagline: A CAD design tool for coding agents (free + open source)
posts.description: Give your coding agent the ability to design real, manufacturable parts. Hand Claude Code or Codex a prompt, a sketch, or image. It writes build123d or CadQuery scripts, then runs agentcad to check its own work, catching broken code, confirming the geometry is watertight and dimensionally correct, and rendering it from every angle so your agent fixes its mistakes before you ever see them. You get back an interactive viewer plus STEP / STL / GLB files — ready to inspect, edit, or print.

posts.name: Solarch
posts.tagline: Interactive diagrams with AI, and your code always in sync
posts.description: Solarch is a diagram-to-code platform powered by a strict rules engine. It instantly transforms visual nodes into deterministic boilerplate code like DTOs and Services. We build the repetitive 80% of the architecture so you can code the core logic.

posts.name: Signal Recorder SR-7
posts.tagline: On-device voice recorder that transcribes + exports Markdown
posts.description: Privacy-first voice recorder for Mac and iPhone. Transcripts and AI summaries run on-device via Apple Speech and FoundationModels — no server, no account, nothing leaving your machine. Every recording exports as a Markdown file with YAML frontmatter — yours, on disk, ready for Obsidian or git. A built-in local MCP server lets Claude Code and other AI tools query the archive. Designed experience-first, to keep you in the moment. $7.99, buy once — Mac and iPhone, no subscription.

posts.name: Mic Drop 3.0
posts.tagline: Mute your mic in any app—with your AirPods
posts.description: The ultimate macOS mute manager is back. Toggle your mic across Zoom, Meet, and Slack instantly using a global shortcut, menu bar icon, or a simple squeeze of your AirPods. Now faster, lighter, and packed with AppleScript support.

posts.name: AgentOS
posts.tagline: Manage AI agents, tasks, workspaces from one control layer
posts.description: Run AI agents like a company. AgentOS helps you coordinate workspaces, agents, tasks, jobs, approvals, and runtime visibility from one local-first control surface built on OpenClaw.

posts.name: NudgeFile
posts.tagline: Automatically organize, rename, and manage files with AI
posts.description: NudgeFile automatically organizes, renames, and manages files using local AI. Monitor folders, automate workflows, detect duplicates, and keep your workspace clean—all while keeping your data on your device.

makers.name: Tony
makers.headline: Designing products that just make sense

posts.name: TrakMac
posts.tagline: Voice-first macro tracking for fitness enthusiasts
posts.description: Voice-first macro tracking for fitness enthusiasts. Tell TrakMac what you ate, in plain language, and it returns calories, protein, carbs, and fat in seconds. No weighing, no barcodes, no database. A formula built from you and your training gets you to about 90% of true. Consider it TrakMac'd™.

posts.name: Cove for Mac
posts.tagline: Like a save/load game for your work
posts.description: Cove saves your complete Mac workspace as a named Session — apps, window positions, browser tabs, terminal directories, Finder paths, even your Focus Mode. One click and it all comes back exactly where you left it. Native adapters for Safari, Chrome, Arc, Terminal, iTerm, VS Code, Xcode, Slack & more. Auto-detect suggests the right Session as you work. 100% local, no cloud, no tracking, no subscription. $9 launch (reg. $19), one-time, 14-day refund. — Alex, solo indie dev

posts.name: Pixel Snapper
posts.tagline: Editor to clean up AI-generated pixel art
posts.description: Sprite Fusion Pixel Snapper is a free and open source tool that automatically fixes messy, blurry, or inconsistent pixel art generated by AI. Ideal for game assets or icons.

posts.name: OrchestraML
posts.tagline: From English prompt to deployed ML model with human approval
posts.description: OrchestraML turns plain English prompts into production-ready deployed ML models while keeping you in total control. Eight specialized agents handle datasets, clean data, engineer features, and train models via FLAML AutoML. Six strict checkpoint gates pause execution for your manual approval. You get a downloadable package with a pkl file and a predict.py script, or an instant live REST API. Safe, secure, encrypted dataset handling. Get two free pipelines daily.

posts.name: Overly
posts.tagline: Search and ask questions inside lecture videos
posts.description: Overly is an AI-powered study layer for lecture videos. Students can search inside long lectures, ask questions, generate summaries, and jump to the exact timestamp where a topic is explained. I built it during a hackathon after noticing how painful it is to revise from long recorded lectures. The MVP is working, tested by a few students, and documented.

posts.name: Nodrix
posts.tagline: Your own IoT cloud, deployed to your Cloudflare account
posts.description: Nodrix is an open-source IoT platform you deploy to your own Cloudflare account in one click. Hardware POSTs JSON over HTTPS, realtime dashboards stream over hibernating WebSockets, automations run at the edge. No broker, no servers, no middleman.

makers.name: Arjun Krishna
makers.headline: Building systems that don't fall over

posts.name: Log Cam
posts.tagline: Record log and ProRes video from RAW frames on iPhone
posts.description: Log Cam is iPhone camera app for filmmakers. Log Cam records HEVC and ProRes video from RAW frames with log gammas, monitoring tools, LUT support, and external storage recording.

posts.name: ChocolateBar
posts.tagline: Add a row under your menu bar for hidden icons
posts.description: Let your notch eat no more! ChocolateBar is a native Mac app that adds a row under your menu bar for icons hidden by the MacBook notch. As you add menubar applications like claude usage notifiers, trackers, productivity apps, the notch starts to eat up menu bar items... and at some point macOS just gives up and shoves icons behind the notch where you can't even click them. Others tries to addresses this by hiding icons. I decided to create an additional bar to show you your menubar items!

posts.name: Soniqo Speech
posts.tagline: On-device speech AI for Mac, Windows, Linux & Android
posts.description: Build voice agents on a complete on-device speech stack: ASR (NVIDIA Nemotron, multilingual + streaming), TTS, voice cloning, diarization, denoising, and full-duplex speech-to-speech (NVIDIA PersonaPlex) — plus a voice agent pipeline for turn-taking, interruptions, and queuing. Runs on Mac, Windows, Linux, and mobile (iPhone + Android), with NPU-optimized inference (CoreML, NNAPI). Swift, Kotlin, and C++ APIs. Plus Speech Studio, a desktop voice-cloning app for creators. Apache 2.0, on-device.

posts.name: 42min
posts.tagline: Free online scheduling with forms, meeting polls & open API
posts.description: 42min is a completely free scheduling tool, a real alternative to Calendly or Cal.com with no paywalls and no per-seat fees. Share a link and let people book, run meeting polls, collect details with booking forms, and automate everything with a full API and webhooks. All the essentials, free. We're launching to learn: what would you need before switching from your current scheduler? Tell us in the comments, your feedback shapes the roadmap.

posts.name: Wisibl
posts.tagline: Turn scattered conversations into searchable knowledge
posts.description: Transcription tools forget. Wisibl remembers. It turns every product conversation into structured, searchable context that compounds over time, decisions, tradeoffs, action items, all linked and queryable. No more rewatching call recordings. Free to start.

posts.name: Intrascope: BYOK + Managed AI for Teams
posts.tagline: Access top AI models without your own API keys
posts.description: Intrascope.app is a secure AI workspace for teams that combines BYOK and managed AI access in one platform. Use top AI models like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, and more without adding your own API keys, or connect your own if you prefer. Share team context, manage permissions, track usage and costs, organize projects with shared manifests, and give your entire company centralized, secure, and cost efficient AI access in one place.

posts.name: Yemake
posts.tagline: Turn any cooking video into a step-by-step text recipe.
posts.description: Yemake is your next-gen AI culinary assistant that generates personalized step-by-step text recipes through 4 methods: input your available ingredients, upload a meal photo, share cooking videos directly from social apps, or state your cravings. Features hands-free voice guidance to follow steps without touching your screen, full nutrition insights, and support for 19 native languages. No more messy screens—just cook!

posts.name: GridHabits
posts.tagline: Streaks drive you. Grids prove you showed up.
posts.description: Most habit trackers give you streaks. Some give you a grid. GridHabits gives you both, plus stats, and recovery on top. Every day you show up fills a square. The streak drives you; the grid keeps a permanent record even when a streak breaks, so your history never disappears. Forgot or finished late? Honestly recover a missed day, last 7 days only, 7 a month. Forgives a real slip without faking consistency. Stats, custom habits, shareable streak card. iOS now, Android soon.

posts.name: Achiv - Stop Guessing What to Write
posts.tagline: Content from real demand, built for Google + AI search
posts.description: Most content tools start from a keyword and a vibe — so you get the average of the internet, and it doesn't rank or convert. Achiv starts from real demand. It mines the actual questions, complaints, and objections your buyers post on Reddit, groups them into clear themes, and writes content grounded in that exact pain — in your buyers' own words. Then it reshapes one idea into an article, a LinkedIn post, or a thread, built to get found in Google and AI search.

posts.name: Narasi AI
posts.tagline: Turn raw ideas into engaging shorts in 5 minutes
posts.description: Narasi AI is an AI-powered tool for creating short-form videos faster. Generate content ideas, write hook-driven scripts, generate voiceovers, add auto-synced captions, generate timed B-rolls, and render publish-ready videos in one streamlined workflow. Built for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

makers.name: Syakir Rahman
makers.headline: A Software Engineer, building Narasi AI

posts.name: Andika AI
posts.tagline: AI Writing Toolkit, Custom Commands and Personalized Prompts
posts.description: Your prompts, your rules — fix, rewrite, and improve your writing with custom AI commands and personalize AI prompts, without leaving your tab.

posts.name: BrandGEO
posts.tagline: See exactly how AI talks about your brand — and what to fix.
posts.description: Your customers research on AI before they buy, and your SEO tools cannot see any of it. BrandGEO is a Generative Engine Optimization platform that measures how ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok and DeepSeek describe your brand. A free 2-minute audit scores you across 6 dimensions on all 5 engines, runs both trained-memory and live web-search modes, and returns a ranked action plan of what to fix first. Weekly monitoring tracks changes and benchmarks competitors. White-label PDFs for agencies.

posts.name: Biohack
posts.tagline: Your food ages you or protects you. Now you can see which.
posts.description: Calorie counting is dead. Your Omega-3 ratio predicts your lifespan better than your BMI ever will. Biohack scores every meal 0-10 for longevity based on 23 nutrients that peer-reviewed research links to how long you live. Not calories. Not macros. The stuff that actually matters. Snap a photo, type it out, or scan a barcode. AI breaks down every ingredient and shows you exactly what's aging you and what's protecting you.

posts.name: StackIQ: Supplement Tracker
posts.tagline: AI Vitamin Scanner & Optimizer
posts.description: StackIQ helps you scan supplements, track dosages and timing, spot ingredient overlap, and check possible supplemStackIQ helps you scan supplements, build your daily stack, track dosages and timing, spot ingredient overlap, and flag possible supplement-medication interactions. Unlike basic supplement trackers, StackIQ focuses on full-stack intelligence — helping you understand what you’re taking, when to take it, and where your routine may need a closer look.ent-medication interactions.

posts.name: NovaMind AI

posts.description: NovaMind AI — intelligent inventory management for Amazon FBA sellers. Prevent stockouts, forecast demand, and optimise reorder timing.

makers.name: Has Uruc
makers.headline: Building NovaMind · Inventory AI for FBA

posts.name: 5 Min Bro
posts.tagline: Live location sharing for people who just want to meet.
posts.description: Tired of waiting for the bro who's "be there in 5 min"? 5 Min Bro fixes that. One tap creates a session. You get a 4-digit code. Your friend types it in. Now you're both on the same live map, watching each other move in real time until you meet. No friend requests. No accounts for the other person. No 24/7 location sharing. Just a short session that ends when you link up. Perfect for meetups, festivals, or finding your squad. Premium: send custom sound recordings 🔊 Free on iOS & Android.

posts.name: jetti
posts.tagline: Reviewers edit your live site, you get changes to ship
posts.description: Tell your AI agent to install jetti. Your client edits the live site. Get back changes your agent can apply. jetti turns website feedback into real edits. Send a link; your reviewer opens the live site (no account) and rewrites copy, swaps images, pins comments. You get back a handoff your AI agent applies in one command. Free for 1 site + 1 reviewer.

makers.name: Ross Resnick
makers.headline: I love making things and helping people

posts.description: Track how AI answers mentioAEO Table scans your domain and shows whether ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini cite your brand. Get your AEO Score, track competitor AI citations, and see exactly where you appear — and where you're invisible. Built for marketing teams who need to know how AI answers talk about their brand, not just their Google ranking.

posts.description: ShawGames is a free browser gaming platform featuring 250+ HTML5 games across Action, Driving, FPS, Minecraft, Puzzle, Brainrot,io Games, 2-Player, Sports, Racing, Multiplayer, and Arcade categories. posts.description: Stop staring at a blank screen. These 10 TikTok scripts are plug-and-play for coaches and entrepreneurs. Topics include 5 AM Discipline, Empire Mindset, Financial Literacy, The 80/20 Rule and more. Download and record instantly.

Every pick is vetted, traffic goes straight to the founder's own page, and we never take a commission. Discover, compare, book, and track sponsorships through plain conversation. No code. No platform fees.

posts.description: MDMA is an open-source format that lets LLMs respond with mounted applications — forms, approval gates, interactive tables, and webhook triggers — right inside Markdown. No custom UI needed. Works with any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or local.

makers.name: Matt Sadowski
makers.headline: Building AI agents / CEO, Mobile Reality

posts.name: SheetSandbox 2.0
posts.tagline: Turn Google Sheets into a REST API — SDKs, Playground & More
posts.description: Connect a Google Sheet, get a REST API instantly. v2 ships Node.js & Python SDKs, an in-dashboard API Playground, one-click token rotation, live analytics, and rate limit alerts. Built for indie devs shipping MVPs fast. $6.99 once.

posts.name: Patent Gnome
posts.tagline: Patent search in minutes for $30. Attorneys charge $1,500+.
posts.description: Patent attorneys charge $1,500–$4,000 and take months. Patent Gnome takes minutes and costs $30. Enter your idea in plain language, get real patent numbers, direct conflicts, and if you're blocked, 5 alternative directions to explore. Not a legal opinion. The research that informs one.

posts.name: Mandala Studio Pro

posts.description: Mandala Studio Pro is a free browser-based mandala drawing tool trusted by 10,000+ designers worldwide. Create intricate sacred geometry patterns with up to 12 symmetry axes, export as PNG, and upgrade to Pro for HD SVG output and commercial rights.

posts.name: Tablesmit
posts.tagline: A minimalist table builder with LaTeX, PDF, and Excel export
posts.description: Every time I needed a table in a Medium write-up or research report, I hit the same wall. Every tool was too heavy, rigid or exported something I was not happy to use. So I built Tablesmit. Free, open-source, no account. Export to PDF, Excel, LaTeX, CSV, PNG or JPEG. Smart paste from Excel. Works offline. The LaTeX export surprised me most. Researchers paste straight intotex files. Medium writers export as PNG. Analysts get client-ready PDFs. Lighthouse 90+. MIT licensed. Built in Lagos.

posts.name: EarMarked
posts.tagline: Library-first audiobook search with value intelligence.
posts.description: EarMarked Audio is live online and ready for testing. Search once for an audiobook, see library availability first, and compare the best way to listen across library holds, subscriptions, and purchase options.

posts.name: FirstLook

posts.description: Hiring is broken. Applications have tripled since 2021, many are AI-generated, and recruiters waste hours screening noise. FirstLook flips it. Candidates answer one short skills question first, and you see the work before the CV. Behavioural signals - time spent, edit patterns, revision depth - show who genuinely engaged with the task. AI doesn’t judge talent. FirstLook surfaces talent. Free tier, no card.

posts.name: Pivvi
posts.tagline: Free AI backup. No account needed.
posts.description: Hit a rate limit, daily cap, or token quota on Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini? Pivvi finds your best free alternative instantly — based on what you're working on. No account, runs in your browser, nothing sent anywhere.

makers.name: Pivvi

posts.name: Hivemind

posts.description: Hivemind is the continual learning skill layer for your coding agents. It captures what every agent on your team does through traces (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes, pi), turns repeated patterns into reusable skills, and propagates them across all of them. New: SkillOpt trains those skills against a held-out test instead of just storing them, so they get sharper over time. Runs on your cloud. Self-hostable, Apache 2.0, free tier.

posts.name: AlphaTales
posts.tagline: Turn product ideas into AI-ready build plans

posts.name: Is My Landing Page Valid?

posts.description: Paste your landing page URL and get a 0-100 conversion score on a fixed rubric, plus the exact leaks costing you signups. Unlock every fix and an AI-rebuilt version of your page for $2,90 (launch price). No account. See teardowns of Stripe, Linear and 37 more.

posts.description: AlphaTales helps founders and product teams turn rough product ideas into structured requirements, market research, workflows, feature specs, architecture, and Dev Packs for AI coding tools. Instead of prompting Cursor, Claude Code, or Codex from scattered notes, AlphaTales creates the planning context first, so builders can move from idea to implementation with more clarity and less rework.

posts.name: KillBounce
posts.tagline: Email verifier that actually handles catch-all domains
posts.description: Three-layer email verification with a real SMTP probe not regex pretending. Built because the $80/month tools couldn't handle catch-all domains on Google Workspace (anti-enumeration tricks every regex-and-DNS approach into a false "accept all"). KillBounce opens a live SMTP session with the recipient server and reads the actual response. $4 per 1,000 credits. Pay-as-you-go. Credits never expire. Public legal stack at /trust for procurement.

posts.name: Polymyth
posts.tagline: Role playing adventure platform for the ChatGPT generation
posts.description: Polymyth is a role playing adventure platform that lets anyone play tabletop RPGs, solo or with friends, with zero rules knowledge and no human game master required. A hybrid engine runs the hard parts of 5E (combat, conditions, spell slots, branching story) while AI characters improvise a living, reactive narrative around your choices. Build a hero in minutes, form a party, and set out. We're bringing the world's most beloved tabletop game to everyone, now in beta on web, iOS, and Android.

posts.name: FormJet
posts.tagline: AI form builder. No per-response fees. $15/mo flat.
posts.description: AI generates the form, question types, and conditional logic in ~8 sec. Free includes the AI (3 generations/mo), 300 responses/mo, and unlimited forms. Pro is $15/mo flat — no per-response fees. Most AI form builders gate AI behind paid plans. FormJet doesn't.

posts.name: Clara

posts.description: Clara is an AI phone agent that answers calls 24/7 AND makes outbound calls to follow up with leads. Most solutions only do reception — Clara does both. Books appointments, handles FAQs, qualifies prospects, and transfers to you when needed. Works with your existing phone number. $149/mo with 7-day free trial. First 10 customers lock in forever. Built by a small business for small businesses. Call (361) 734-4096 for a live demo.

makers.name: Ron Sublett

posts.name: VoxPresenter

Present flawlessly while the app seamlessly syncs with your Mac to control your PowerPoint slides over the local network. Whether you're recording a video, giving a keynote, or practicing a pitch, VoxPresenter ensures your delivery is perfectly timed and natural.

makers.name: Xavier Larrodé

posts.name: GoByVibe

posts.tagline: Security middleware for AI agents and MCP servers
posts.description: Kavach MCP Security is a security middleware for MCP servers and AI agents. It inspects tool calls before execution to detect prompt injections, secret exposure, sensitive data leaks, and unsafe actions. Developers can enforce security policies, rate limits, tool access controls, and audit logging with minimal code changes. Built for the growing ecosystem of AI agents, MCP servers, APIs, and autonomous workflows.

posts.name: Dockr

posts.description: Dockr turns your codebase into living, always-current documentation. No stale wikis. No manual doc maintenance. Just documentation that evolves with your code.

It helps you stay organized by tracking applications, deadlines, and company updates in one place. With a clean dashboard and calendar view, you can monitor application status like applied, shortlisted, or selected, and never miss important placement drives. Built for students to simplify and streamline the placement journey with clarity and ease.

posts.name: Referralful
posts.tagline: The affiliate platform built for SaaS growth

posts.name: Ritn3D
posts.tagline: Walk through any floor plan in 3D — from a phone photo
posts.description: Upload a JPG, PNG, or PDF of any floor plan — phone photo, scanned blueprint, or CAD export. Get a fully interactive 3D model in under two minutes. Walk through every room at eye level, drag in furniture with real-world dimensions, swap walls and floors, share a live 3D link that opens in any browser, or export STL for 3D printing. Built for homeowners, designers, agents, architects, and makers. Free plan included — no card required. Web, iOS, Android.

posts.name: Bay of Bengal
posts.tagline: Discover verified Bangladesh exporters, the smarter way
posts.description: Finding verified supplier information from Bangladesh outside of garments is nearly impossible. Data is scattered across EPB, DIFE, customs, and association websites with no single complete source. Bay of Bengal aggregates it all. Search by product, HS code, district or company name. Every listing includes trust scores, compliance status, worker counts, and EPB registration verification. Free to use.

posts.name: QC Buddy

Lives in your menu bar, exports PDF reports and Premiere Pro XML markers. Free 14-day trial.

posts.tagline: Self-hostable JavaScript workers. No Node, Bun or Docker.
posts.description: Kyushu is a self-hostable Wasm sandbox for JavaScript workers. Think Cloudflare Workers, but on your own VPS. Write a JS fetch handler, ship it as a standalone binary, and run it on your server. Use cases could be running untrusted code safely, building edge-like handlers on your infra, or giving AI agents a sandboxed environment to execute logic. Open source. Early stage. Give it a try and upvote if you ❤️ it!

posts.name: Royal Ledger- Cost & License Tracker
posts.tagline: Know exactly what your WordPress site costs you
posts.description: Most WordPress site owners can't tell you what their site costs them per year, they have monthly hosting on this card, domains on that card, picked up a handful of plugins on different deals throughout the year- in short its a mess! Royal Ledger fixes that. Track every plugin, hosting account, domain, and SaaS subscription tied to your site in one place. Stores your vendor license keys in an AES-256-CBC + HMAC encrypted vault. Renewal calendar with email reminders- Completely free, no account.

posts.name: Gum — Git User Manager
posts.tagline: Like nvm for Git: switch identities and SSH configs.
posts.description: 👋 I'm ziyi. Every dev with multiple Git accounts knows this pain: git config --global, ssh-add, editing ~/.ssh/config. Daily. So I built Gum – like nvm for Git. One command (gum use work) switches both identity and SSH keys. ✨ Key features: • Auto-reads & manages your ~/.ssh/config • One-line install: macOS, Linux, WSL (Homebrew, apt, Scoop) • Interactive UI (arrow keys / vim) Before: 5 manual steps. After: gum use work. Open source. Free. Built for devs who hate context switching.

posts.name: Tilt.
posts.tagline: The endless puzzle that respects your time.

Your best score lives forever. Every leaderboard run is replayed server-side against its seed — if your inputs don't match the score, it rejects. The board is honest. Free on iOS and Android. Built by WEBIST LLC.

Built-in MCP server for AI agents (Claude, Cursor, Cline). Replaces sed/awk for structured edits. Benchmark: Claude 7/7, ChatGPT 1/7, Gemini 1/7. MIT licensed. Free forever.

posts.tagline: Your daily tech digest, written by an AI agent every morning

The golden rule is enforced in code: a message is deleted from IMAP only after it’s archived and checksum-verified. v0.1.0 is live on GitHub.
